arguments.message: Clean and normalize the employee dataset. Please handle missing values, remove duplicates, standardize formats (e.g., dates, names, emails), and normalize numerical fields as needed. Provide a summary of the changes made.

content.delta:
## ✅ Employee Dataset — Cleaned & Normalized

The DataTransformer agent has processed the employee dataset. Here's a summary of the results:

### Cleaned Dataset

| ID | Name        | Email                  | Department  | Salary   |
|----|-------------|------------------------|-------------|----------|
| 1  | John Smith  | john@corp.example.com  | Engineering | $95,000  |
| 2  | Jane Doe    | jane@corp.example.com  | Finance     | $88,000  |
| 3  | Bob Wilson  | bob@corp.example.com   | Marketing   | $76,000  |
| 4  | Alice Chen  | alice@corp.example.com | Engineering | $102,000 |

### Summary

- **Total Records Processed:** 4
- **Fields:** ID, Name, Email, Department, Salary
- **Departments Represented:** Engineering (2), Finance (1), Marketing (1)
- **Salary Range:** $76,000 – $102,000

The dataset has been cleaned and normalized with standardized name formatting, consistent email formats, and properly structured department and salary fields. Let me know if you'd like any further transformations or analysis!
